mods: adapt Givi luggage to Touratech rack

bikes.filter: OEM: 307363 /  HiFlo: HF160 or HF160RC / Mahle: OC619 / K&N: KN160
bikes.oilpref: Motorex Power Synt 4T or Shell Rotella T6
bikes.notes:
OIL: BMW 83 21 2 365 958 
OIL FILTER: BMW 11 42 7 721 779 (71 mm, flats, spec)
CRUSH WASHER: BMW 07 11 9 963 340 gasket ring

Castrol Power1 Racing 4T or ENI i-Ride PG recommended.
Michelin City Grip 2

149104: https://www.scooterwest.com/wheel-bolt-with-allen-head-each-5-required-149104.html

149104C01 (Chrome): https://www.scooterwest.com/chrome-wheel-bolts-modern-vespa-149104c01.html

Wave Washer 006968: https://www.scooterwest.com/wave-washer-200cc-006968.html
maint: fix rust on vespa windshield hardware

bikes.notes: Same specs as 2016 model. No traditional oil filter — uses a washable screen.
Off-road: air down to ~20 PSI for traction. Filter cover has gasket 15412-KYJ-901

Off-road: reduce to 15–18 PSI for traction.
